_comment: License allowlist gate config (PARANOID). A PRODUCTION dependency whose license is not in `allowedSpdx` — including UNKNOWN/Custom — FAILS, unless (1) a `licenseOverrides` correction, (2) its exact NAME is in `exemptions`, or (3) its name matches an `exemptionPrefixes` entry. Read by scripts/license-check.mjs. Plain JSON — no comments; document with _-prefixed string keys.

exemptions.reason: web3.js v4 transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli. LGPL-3.0; not removable without dropping the graph tooling. Rides out with a future graph-cli that clears web3.js v4.
web3.js v4 transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli. LGPL-3.0; not removable without dropping the graph tooling. Rides out with a future graph-cli that clears web3.js v4.
web3.js v4 transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli. LGPL-3.0; not removable without dropping the graph tooling. Rides out with a future graph-cli that clears web3.js v4.
web3.js v4 transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli. LGPL-3.0; not removable without dropping the graph tooling. Rides out with a future graph-cli that clears web3.js v4.
web3.js v4 transitive of @graphprotocol/graph-cli. LGPL-3.0; not removable without dropping the graph tooling. Rides out with a future graph-cli that clears web3.js v4.
ReScript stdlib, transitive of the graph tooling. package.json declares 'SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE'; the LICENSE file is LGPL-3.0 (not allowed), so exempted rather than overridden.
